svg.text: SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE · GEMINI LIVE AGENT HACKATHON
▸ System prompt w/ live driver context
Voice flow: Browser mic (16kHz PCM16) → FastAPI → Gemini Live API → FastAPI → Browser speaker (24kHz PCM16)
All state is shared in-process via state.py to eliminate module-split race conditions between tool handlers and REST endpoints
Real ELD data from JY Carriers (49 drivers) via Samsara API · Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio for natural voice interruption
Gemini Live Agent Hackathon · Live Agents Category
Google GenAI SDK · Cloud Run · Cloud Build · #GeminiLiveAgentChallenge
